# duration

**Instance Property**

The duration, in seconds, of the Live Photo.

## Declaration

```swift
var duration: CMTime { get }
```

## Examining an Editing Context’s Live Photo

- **fullSizeImage**: The unedited still photo content of the Live Photo.
- **photoTime**: The offset, in seconds, from the beginning of the Live Photo’s duration to the time corresponding to its still photo.
- **orientation**: The image orientation of the Live Photo.
